name: Rock Paper Scissors
description: A modern, interactive frontend implementation of the classic game built with React.

details.overview: This application delivers a highly responsive, interactive gaming experience powered by a clean React component architecture. Leveraging Vite for optimized builds and lightning-fast HMR, it ensures a production-grade UI layer with robust client-side state management.
technicalHighlights: Architected modular React components leveraging custom hooks for decoupled game logic and state synchronization.
Optimized frontend bundle performance and development velocity utilizing Vite's build pipeline.
Engineered scalable, performant styles using raw CSS without heavy framework overhead.
